info.name: ESS Leave PATCH By Reference
info.description:
Approve or reject all leave rows that share a single BC leaveReferenceNumber.

Two variants:
  1. Approve by Reference (boolean true)
  2. Reject by Reference (boolean false)

The filter is the URL parameter :refNumber (the BC reference, e.g. PR000027).
Body supports: isApproved (true/false), approvedByName, approvedAt, approverRemarks.
If approvedByName/approvedAt are omitted, the server fills them from the logged-in user and current timestamp.

variable.description: Render backend base URL (override for local: http://localhost:3000)

request.description:
Marks every leave row with leaveReferenceNumber={{refNumber}} as Approved.

Body fields:
  - isApproved (boolean, required if status not sent): true → Approved, false → Rejected
  - approvedByName (string, optional): if omitted, uses the logged-in user's name
  - approvedAt (ISO date, optional): if omitted, server uses new Date() (current timestamp)
  - approverRemarks (string, optional): free-text note

Alternative: send `"status": "Approved"` instead of `isApproved: true`.

Response 200:
{
  "message": "2 leave(s) approved for ref PR000027",
  "refNumber": "PR000027",
  "isApproved": true,
  "approvedByName": "Mohd Riyaz Uddin",
  "approvedAt": "2026-06-08T00:00:00.000Z",
  "leaves": [ ... ]
}

Marks every leave row with leaveReferenceNumber={{refNumber}} as Rejected.

Same body shape as the Approve variant, but isApproved: false → status becomes Rejected.

Alternative payload using `status` string (Approved | Rejected) instead of `isApproved` boolean.
Same effect.
